notes: HW bypass OFF re-test. Submitted PII via composer on claude.ai/new (logged-in as janghee). Engine block warning rendered as answer-area replacement immediately below the user message: '⚠ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Toast 'This conversation could not be found' appeared top-right indicating engine intercepted /api/append_message before persistence (URL did advance to /chat/4cd82448-...). Compared to prior 1494 FAIL_NOT_RENDERED (with HW bypass ON): NOW with HW bypass OFF the engine fires correctly on logged-in claude.ai — this strongly suggests the prior 1494 failure WAS caused by HW bypass, not by an engine auth-state gap. (Network filter on 'append_message' returned 0 hits because tracking starts at first call — but the visible warning + URL change + toast are sufficient evidence.)
